title: Splinecart Unofficial Version（Splinecart非官方版）
description:
us This version is not an official version; it is a legal branch of the original mod's MIT license, created for Chinese localization and the 1.20.1 reset version, official name ：splinecart
cn 此版本并非官方版本，为原模组MIT许可证的合法分支，为中文汉化和1.20.1重置版，官方名：splinecart
body:
这里推荐一个非常强力的整合包，可以大幅提升帧率和内存利用效率，推荐大家去试试Here's a super powerful pack I recommend—it can greatly boost frame rates and memory efficiency. You should definitely give it a try.：https://modrinth.com/modpack/fps--optimization

cn 此版本并非官方版本，为中文汉化和1.20.1重置版，是MIT许可证下的合法分支，官方网站[splinecart](https://modrinth.com/mod/splinecart)
us This version is not an official version. It is a Chinese localization and a 1.20.1 reset version, a legitimate branch under the MIT license, official website：[splinecart](https://modrinth.com/mod/splinecart)
这是什么？ / What is this?
🇨🇳 Splinecart 让你在 Minecraft 中搭建曲线轨道过山车。原版铁路只能直行或 45° 转弯，而 Splinecart 让你在任意两点之间铺设平滑曲线轨道，打造真正流畅的矿车路线。
🇺🇸 Splinecart lets you build curved minecart roller coasters in Minecraft. Vanilla rails are limited to straight lines and 45° turns — Splinecart lets you connect any two points with a smooth spline curve, creating truly fluid minecart rides.
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de32da9ba7572315c76577e36cf56adbf7dbf37b_0.webp)

三种轨道类型 / Track Types
🇨🇳

普通轨道 — 依靠重力和地形决定速度，适合标准路段
链条轨道（Chain Drive Track） — 主动推动矿车前进，适合爬坡路段
磁性轨道（Magnetic Track） — 通过红石信号控制速度，可用于发射、加速或制动

🇺🇸

Track — Standard travel; speed is determined by gravity and terrain
Chain Drive Track — Actively carries minecarts forward; great for steep uphill sections
Magnetic Track — Speed is controlled by the redstone signal powering its track tie; use it for powered launches or braking segments


使用方法 / How to Use
🇨🇳

放置一个 Track Ties 方块，右键旋转至目标朝向（方块上的深色箭头为前进方向）
在另一处放置第二个 Track Ties 方块
手持轨道物品依次右键两个节点，曲线轨道即生成
用原版铁轨将矿车引入第一个节点，自动上车开始行驶

🇺🇸

Place a Track Ties block and right-click to rotate it (dark arrows indicate the forward direction)
Place a second Track Ties block elsewhere in the desired orientation
Use a Track item on the first block, then the second — a curved track section is created
Use vanilla rails to guide a minecart into the first track tie to begin riding


晕动症提示 / Motion Sickness Warning
🇨🇳 骑乘时摄像机会随轨道旋转，可能引起晕动症。如有不适，请执行：
🇺🇸 Splinecart features jarring camera rotation that may cause motion sickness. Run the following command before riding if you are affected:
/splinecartc config rotate_camera false
🇨🇳 可用 /splinecartc config rotate_camera true 重新开启。第三人称视角也有助于缓解不适。
🇺🇸 You can re-enable it with /splinecartc config rotate_camera true. Third-person mode can also help reduce discomfort.

| 项目 / Item | 内容 / Content |
|---|---|
| Minecraft | 1.20.x（基于 1.20.1 编译 / compiled on 1.20.1） |
| 加载器 / Loader | Fabric |
| 依赖 / Requires | Fabric API |
